chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 766 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. -.-.-. For last couple of dates no one is appearing on behalf of petitioner. On 27.09.2016 this Court has passed a detailed order, whereunder the petitioner’s main grievance about causing him harassment was addressed. Learned State Counsel has referred to paragraph 3 of his comments filed by respondent No.2 (SSP Mirpurkhas), wherein pendency of a civil suit having No. 50/2016 before the learned 3rd Senior Civil Judge, Mirpurkhas is mentioned. The petitioner has not refuted this important factual aspect of the case. Perusal of petition shows that petitioner is seeking relief in the nature of a writ of mandamus against respondents No.1 to 3, inter alia, for restoration of houses and temple of the petitioner and his community. Since the matter is already sub judice before the competent forum and in view of the detailed parawise comments filed on behalf of official respondents, this petition can be disposed of with the directions that official respondents will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and all respondents are directed not to cause harassment to the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Ali Haider
